channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Amazon raises C$14 billion in the largest Canadian dollar bond sale on record to fund AI infrastructure
item.description: Amazon is raising C$14 billion, approximately $10 billion, from investment-grade bonds denominated in Canadian dollars, according to Bloomberg. The deal is the largest corporate bond offering ever in the currency, surpassing the C$8.5 billion Alphabet raised … [Amazon, Alphabet]

item.title: PhysicsX reels in $300M to speed up hardware design with AI
item.description: PhysicsX Ltd, a startup using artificial intelligence to speed up hardware design projects, today announced that it has raised $300 million in funding. Returning investor Temasek led the Series C round. It was joined by Nvidia Corp., chipmaking equipment supp… [Intel, Nvidia]
